LanguageData.AO_MusicHearingAbility.description: How effective musical sources of enjoyment are, such as radios.
LanguageData.AO_MusicHearingAbility.label: hearing ability
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldEnergyMax.description: The maximum energy a shield generator can have at one time. More energy absorbs more damage.
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldEnergyMax.label: shield max energy
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldRadius.description: The area covered when the energy shield is active.
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldRadius.label: shield radius
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldRechargeRate.descriptio: The rate at which a shield gains energy as long as it is not broken.
LanguageData.VFES_EnergyShieldRechargeRate.label: shield recharge rate
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingLuckOffset.description: The chance for every fishing attempt to fish a special item instead of a regular fish is increased by this offset.
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingLuckOffset.label: fishing luck
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingSpeedFactor.description: The speed at which a person can fish is multiplied by this factor.
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingSpeedFactor.label: fishing speed
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingYieldFactor.description: The fishing yield of a person is multiplied by this factor.
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingYieldFactor.label: fishing yield
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxApparel.descrip: The maximum energy a shield generator can have at one time. More energy absorbs more damage.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxApparel.label: shield max energy
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxFactor.descript: Factor of the maximum shield energy that the user can boost through various means.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxFactor.label: shield max energy factor
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxOffset.descript: Offset of the maximum shield energy that the user can boost through various means.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxOffset.label: shield max energy offset
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxPawn.descriptio: The maximum energy a shield generator can have at one time. More energy absorbs more damage.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxPawn.label: shield max energy
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusApparel.descriptio: The area covered when the energy shield is active.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusApparel.label: shield radius
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusPawn.description: The area covered when the energy shield is active.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusPawn.label: shield radius
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRechargeRateApparel.desc: The rate at which a shield gains energy as long as it is not broken.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRechargeRatePawn.descrip: The rate at which a shield gains energy as long as it is not broken.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRechargeRatePawn.label: shield recharge rate
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeAttackDamageFactor.description: A multiplier on melee attack damage.
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeAttackDamageFactor.label: melee attack damage factor
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeAttackSpeedFactor.description: A multiplier on melee attack speed.
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeAttackSpeedFactor.label: melee attack speed factor
LanguageData.VEF_RangeAttackDamageFactor.description: A multiplier on range attack damage.
LanguageData.VEF_RangeAttackDamageFactor.label: range attack damage factor
LanguageData.VEF_RangeAttackSpeedFactor.description: A multiplier on range attack speed.
LanguageData.VEF_RangeAttackSpeedFactor.label: range attack speed factor
LanguageData.VEF_RangedCooldownFactor.description: The cooldown on ranged weapons of the wearer is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_RangedCooldownFactor.label: ranged cooldown factor
LanguageData.VEF_VerbCooldownFactor.description: The cooldown on weapons is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_VerbCooldownFactor.label: verb cooldown factor
LanguageData.VEF_VerbRangeFactor.description: The range on weapons is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_VerbRangeFactor.label: weapon range factor
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingBreakdownFactor.description: A multiplier on how often this building breaks down.
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingBreakdownFactor.label: breakdown factor
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingLearningRateOffset.descripti: A multiplier on how quickly children learn during lessons which are assisted by this.
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingLearningRateOffset.label: learning rate
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingMaxOverclockFactor.descripti: A multiplier on the maximum possible overclock of a factory.
LanguageData.VEF_BuildingMaxOverclockFactor.label: maximum overclock factor
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxBuilding.descri: The maximum energy the shield can have. More energy allows the shield to absorb more damage.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldEnergyMaxBuilding.label: shield max energy
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusBuilding.descripti: The radius of the energy shield protection.
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRadiusBuilding.label: shield radius
LanguageData.VEF_EnergyShieldRechargeRateBuilding.des: The rate at which the shield recharges energy per second, as long as it is not broken.
LanguageData.VEF_FactoryHeatPerSecondFactor.descripti: A multiplier on the heat per second produced by a factory.
LanguageData.VEF_FactoryHeatPerSecondFactor.label: heat per second factor
LanguageData.VEF_BodySize_Multiplier.description: Increases the size of the pawn by a multiple of their current size
LanguageData.VEF_BodySize_Multiplier.label: body size multiplier
LanguageData.VEF_BodySize_Offset.description: Increases the size of the pawn relative to their current size
LanguageData.VEF_BodySize_Offset.label: body size offset
LanguageData.VEF_CosmeticBodySize_Multiplier.descript: Increases the size of the pawn by a multiple of their current size
LanguageData.VEF_CosmeticBodySize_Multiplier.label: cosmetic body size multiplier
LanguageData.VEF_CosmeticBodySize_Offset.description: Increases the size of the pawn relative to their current size
LanguageData.VEF_CosmeticBodySize_Offset.label: cosmetic body size offset
LanguageData.VEF_FoodCapacityMultiplier.description: Increases the size of the pawn's hunger bar. This does not affect hunger
LanguageData.VEF_FoodCapacityMultiplier.label: body food capacity multiplier
LanguageData.VEF_GrowthPointMultiplier.description: Increases the amount of growth points accumulated by children when learning
LanguageData.VEF_GrowthPointMultiplier.label: growth point multiplier
LanguageData.VEF_HeadSize_Cosmetic.label: head size multiplier
LanguageData.VEF_MassCarryCapacity.description: Total mass carrying capacity of the pawn in caravans.
LanguageData.VEF_MassCarryCapacity.label: mass carry capacity
LanguageData.VEF_MTBLovinFactor.description: A factor of the mean time between (MTB) this person looking for some lovin'.
LanguageData.VEF_MTBLovinFactor.label: MTB lovin factor
LanguageData.VEF_NegativeThoughtDurationFactor.descri: The duration of negative thoughts is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_NegativeThoughtDurationFactor.label: thought duration factor - negative
LanguageData.VEF_NeutralThoughtDurationFactor.descrip: The duration of neutral thoughts is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_NeutralThoughtDurationFactor.label: thought duration factor - neutral
LanguageData.VEF_PawnRenderPosOffset.description: Modifies the pawn's rendered position in y-axis.
LanguageData.VEF_PawnRenderPosOffset.label: pawn render offset
LanguageData.VEF_PositiveThoughtDurationFactor.descri: The duration of positive thoughts is multiplied by this value.
LanguageData.VEF_PositiveThoughtDurationFactor.label: thought duration factor - positive
LanguageData.VEF_RangedDodgeChance.description: Chance to dodge a ranged attack that would've otherwise hit, or (if negative) get hit by a ranged attack that was meant for a different target.
LanguageData.VEF_RangedDodgeChance.label: ranged dodge chance
LanguageData.VEF_GaussProjectileDamageModifier.descri: How much the damage dealt is modified (as a percentage of the base damage) for each previously hit target.
LanguageData.VEF_GaussProjectileDamageModifier.label: piercing damage modifier
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeWeaponRange.description: The range of this melee weapon.
LanguageData.VEF_MeleeWeaponRange.label: melee weapon range
LanguageData.VCE_FoodImprovementChance.description: The chance that this colonist will convert a crafted meal into a higher type (simple to fine, fine to lavish). Applies to bakes, grills and base game meals.
LanguageData.VCE_FoodImprovementChance.label: food improvement chance
LanguageData.VCEF_FoodCondimentChance.description: The chance that this colonist will add a random condiment to any crafted meal (except resurrector nanites).
LanguageData.VCEF_FoodCondimentChance.label: food condiment chance
LanguageData.VBE_WritingSpeed.description: A multiplier applied to the speed this person can write books at.
LanguageData.VBE_WritingSpeed.label: writing speed
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicEntropyMinimum.description: The minimum amount of neural heat. This is increased by maintaining certain psycasts, which give heat that never fades.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicEntropyMinimum.label: minimum neural heat
LanguageData.VPE_PsyfocusCostFactor.description: A multiplier on psyfocus cost of psycasts.
LanguageData.VPE_PsyfocusCostFactor.label: psyfocus cost factor
LanguageData.VSE_ArmorPenetrationFactor.description: A multiplier applied to armor penetration of attacks by this pawn.
LanguageData.VSE_ArmorPenetrationFactor.label: armor penetration factor
LanguageData.VSE_ArtQuality.description: A bonus to the quality of art produced by this pawn.
LanguageData.VSE_ArtQuality.label: art quality bonus
LanguageData.VSE_ArtSpeed.description: A multiplier to how fast this pawn creates art.
LanguageData.VSE_ArtSpeed.label: art creation speed
LanguageData.VSE_AttackOnFailChanceFactor.description: A multiplier applied to the chance for failed taming attempts to result in animals attacking this pawn.
LanguageData.VSE_AttackOnFailChanceFactor.label: attack on tame fail chance factor
LanguageData.VSE_ComponentCraftingSpeed.description: How fast this pawn can create components (both industrial and advanced).
LanguageData.VSE_ComponentCraftingSpeed.label: component crafting speed
LanguageData.VSE_ConstructQuality.description: A bonus added to the quality of things built by this pawn.
LanguageData.VSE_ConstructQuality.label: construction quality bonus
LanguageData.VSE_FloorSpeed.description: How fast this pawn can work on floors.
LanguageData.VSE_FloorSpeed.label: floor work speed
LanguageData.VSE_MeleeCooldownFactor.description: A multiplier applied to the cooldown of melee attacks by this pawn.
LanguageData.VSE_MeleeCooldownFactor.label: melee cooldown factor
LanguageData.VSE_PeaceTalksChance.description: How likely this pawn is to succeed at peace talks.
LanguageData.VSE_PeaceTalksChance.label: peace talks success chance
LanguageData.VSE_RecruitRate.description: How fast this pawn can recruit prisoners to the colony.
LanguageData.VSE_RecruitRate.label: recruitment rate
LanguageData.VSE_RepairSpeed.description: How fast this pawn can do repairs.
LanguageData.VSE_RepairSpeed.label: repair speed
LanguageData.VSE_RockChunkChance.description: The chance for this pawn to get a chunk when mining natural rock.
LanguageData.VSE_RockChunkChance.label: rock chunk chance
LanguageData.VSE_RoofSpeed.description: How fast this pawn can work on roofs.
LanguageData.VSE_RoofSpeed.label: roof work speed
LanguageData.VSE_TailoringSpeed.description: How fast this pawn tailors clothes.
LanguageData.VSE_TailoringSpeed.label: tailoring speed
LanguageData.VSE_WeaponCreationSpeed.description: How fast this pawn can create weapons.
LanguageData.VSE_WeaponCreationSpeed.label: weapon creation speed
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronMaintenanceLoss.description: The base rate at which an ARC's maintenance is reduced, per day.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronMaintenanceLoss.label: maintenance loss base rate
LanguageData.RecruitRelationshipDamage.label: recruit relationship damage
LanguageData.RecruitRelationshipDamage.description: The damage done to the relationship with the faction of this person when successfully recruiting.
LanguageData.ForcedRecruitRelationshipDamage.label: forced recruit relationship damage
LanguageData.ForcedRecruitRelationshipDamage.descript: The damage done to the relationship with the faction of this person when forcefully recruiting.
LanguageData.RecruitEffectivity.label: recruit effectiveness factor
LanguageData.RecruitEffectivity.description: The effectiveness when trying to charm visitors to join your faction.
LanguageData.VGE_AccuracyGlobal.description: Accuracy when firing at targets on the world map. Multiplied by the operator's gravship targeting skill.
LanguageData.VGE_AccuracyGlobal.label: global accuracy
LanguageData.VGE_GlobalMaintenanceSensitivity.descrip: An offset to the maintenance sensitivity of the grav engine and all its linked facilities.
LanguageData.VGE_GlobalMaintenanceSensitivity.label: global maintenance sensitivity
LanguageData.VGE_GravPowerAdjacency.description: A factor on the power produced, influenced by the amount of other gravcore power cells or coils around.
LanguageData.VGE_GravPowerAdjacency.label: grav power adjacency
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceSensitivity.description: A factor of the difficulty to maintain this structure, as well as the speed at which its maintenance will deplete.
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceSensitivity.label: maintenance sensitivity
LanguageData.VGE_SubstructureSupportMultiplier.descri: A multiplier to the maximum substructure supported by the gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_SubstructureSupportMultiplier.label: substructure support multiplier
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipTargeting.description: How well this person operates the targeting terminal and how accurate their shots with gravship weaponry will be.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipTargeting.label: gravship targeting
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipMaintenance.description: How well this person can maintain gravship components.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipMaintenance.label: gravship maintenance
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipResearch.description: How well this person understands the raw gravdata.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipResearch.label: gravship research
LanguageData.VQEA_MasterfulCooking.description: A multiplier on cooking speed, associated with the masterful cooking archite gene.
LanguageData.VQEA_MasterfulCooking.label: masterful cooking
LanguageData.VQEA_Prowess.description: A multiplier on melee hit chance and dodge chance, associated with the prowess archite gene. Bear in mind base game doesn't show Melee hit chance on this infobox.
LanguageData.VQEA_Prowess.label: prowess
LanguageData.ThirstRateMultiplier.description: A multiplier on how quickly a creature becomes thirsty.
LanguageData.ThirstRateMultiplier.label: thirst rate multiplier
LanguageData.BladderRateMultiplier.description: A multiplier on how quickly a creatures bladder level falls.
LanguageData.BladderRateMultiplier.label: bladder rate multiplier
LanguageData.HygieneRateMultiplier.description: A multiplier on how quickly a creatures hygiene level falls.
LanguageData.HygieneRateMultiplier.label: hygiene rate multiplier
